chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-519 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 19.08.2025 Ms. Wajiha Mehdi Asstt. Attorney General -.-.-.-.-.-.-. This is an old case of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was lastly fixed on 11.10.2023, which is almost 02 years ago. Despite lapse of almost two years, today none appeared for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
